problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
